posts.title: This is Mrrrr.Chi and Hello hexo!
posts.text: The Front-matter is the toppest part of the page using double --- to seperate. Here is the doc of the Front-matter in Chinese. Welcome to Hexo! This is my very first post. Check documentation for more info. If I get any problems when using Hexo, I can find the answer in troubleshooting or I can ask me on GitHub. Quick Start Create a new post123$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new page/draft/post "xxx(title)"$ hexo new name{scaffolds(DIY)} "xxx(title)" The scaffolds are powered by Nunjucks<if you wanna diy your own,such as album…> More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
